speaker: speaker1
text: I went to the tutoring service centre on campus today . And I got a job .

speaker: speaker1
text: They got me a part-time tutoring job , teaching an Australian businessman Chinese .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's wonderful . I want to get a part-time job too . Tell me what I should do .

speaker: speaker1
text: It's very simple actually . You can go to the service centre and have your name and job interest resisted . They will give you a call if any job comes up .
